globalNews.title: Trump says ceasefire is 'over' after US and Iran trade strikes
globalNews.summary: Speaking ahead of a Nato summit, the president says US negotiators can keep talking with the Iranians "if they want".

globalNews.title: US strikes target Iranian military boats
globalNews.summary: The US has launched the strikes on Iran in response to attacks on three oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.

globalNews.title: German doctor jailed for murder of 15 patients and suspected of more
globalNews.summary: The German palliative care doctor has been sentenced to life imprisonment for killing 15 of his patients.

globalNews.title: Will Le Pen rise again? French nationalist leader defiant after court's ruling
globalNews.summary: Within hours of a court of appeal confirming a guilty verdict, Marine Le Pen had already launched her presidential campaign.

globalNews.title: Teenager arrested after two girls, 13, seriously injured in German school attack
globalNews.summary: Police said a major operation was under way in the area of Welfen-Gymnasium secondary school in Schongau, Bavaria.

cryptoNews.title: Bull Bitcoin asks French court to strike down DAC8 implementing decree
cryptoNews.summary: The non-custodial Bitcoin exchange petitioned to annul a French decree implementing DAC8, arguing the rules could create surveillance and physical risks for up to 135 million European crypto holders.

cryptoNews.title: India crypto tax filings lag trading activity: Report
cryptoNews.summary: India’s tax department reportedly found that fewer than a quarter of the 645,000 people who made crypto transactions reported them on tax returns.

cryptoNews.title: The 5 types of real world assets being tokenized fastest onchain
cryptoNews.summary: Tokenized Real World Assets span treasuries, real estate, stocks, commodities and private credit. The sector is still small in TradFi terms but it's growing very, very fast.

cryptoNews.title: Kazakhstan president signs decree to accelerate crypto adoption
cryptoNews.summary: Kazakhstan targets gas-powered electricity for mining, income tax exemptions for regulated crypto transactions and cross-border stablecoin payments in a new decree signed by the president.

cryptoNews.title: BTC speculators in focus as analysis says 'textbook Bitcoin bottom' is underway
cryptoNews.summary: Analysis flagged a Bitcoin moving average derivative that last triggered at the end of the 2022 bear market as BTC price action returned to its reversal zone.

aiNews.title: Former OpenAI exec Kevin Weil is now on the board of Stoke Space
aiNews.summary: Kevin Weil's new role at Stoke Space suggests reusable rockets are the next hot thing in Silicon Valley.

aiNews.title: Hot French startup ZML releases free product to speed inference across lots of AI chips
aiNews.summary: ZML, a hot French AI startup endorsed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has now released ZML/LLMD, software that could make running AI less costly.

aiNews.title: AI chip maker SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation, 5 months after last mega round
aiNews.summary: AI chip maker SambaNova has raised at an $11 billion valuation months after Intel was rumored to be trying to buy it for about $1.6 billion.

aiNews.title: Meta just launched a new AI generator, Muse Image, and users are already pushing back over use of their photos
aiNews.summary: The new image-generating model has numerous use cases, including advertising and decorating, and creator-based opportunities.

aiNews.title: Why the rise of open source AI isn’t hurting Anthropic … yet
aiNews.summary: Open source models’ success isn’t coming at the expense of frontier labs. Instead, they each seem to capture two phases of the same life cycle.

economicCalendar.description: Consumer Price Index - key inflation measure
Federal Reserve interest rate announcement and policy statement
